Messy mixed copy paste synthetic
PowerChart + portal paste
pt is 55-year-old male... BP:132/82; taking losartan
labs pasted: HDL 48 | LDL-C 132 | TC 205 | TG 180 non-fasting | ApoB=110 | Lp(a)=80 nmol/L
A1c reference range: diabetes >=6.5; actual A1c 7.1
kidney: creatinine 1.15, eGFR 55, urine albumin creatinine ratio 45 mg/g
CAC not done in 2020; CAC 350 on 2026 scan
Never smoker. family history Father MI age 49. hsCRP 2.4. no clinical ASCVD. Stopped statin.
BMI 31
Diabetes yes
